index_html: 只保留 HTML 框架與 script/css 引用
active_script_manifest: 目前正式載入順序以 js/script-manifest.js 為準；V223 已移除根目錄 js/patch-02.js 到 js/patch-20.js 的重複檔，舊版補丁歸檔保留在 js/legacy/patches。
note: 此版先做安全外部化：功能邏輯完整保留，但從 index.html 拆到 js/*.js；下一階段可再把 app-core.js 依功能語意拆成 monster/item/reverse/compound/soul/jiangshen。
changes_v201: Moved monster search/detail/drop functions out of js/app-core.js
index.html now loads js/monster.js after js/app-core.js
changes_v202b: Created js/item.js as a safe staged module copy.
Kept original item functions inside js/app-core.js to preserve item/reverse/compound menu behavior.
Previous V202/V202a removed too much and broke reverse/compound; V202b avoids that.
changes_v203: Reverse search and showReverse now have active overrides in reverse.js
Search candidates are de-duplicated by ITEM ID
app-core.js still keeps original reverse functions as fallback
changes_v203b: Restored reverse detail page to original showReverse UI
Original UI shows each monster's drop percentage as before
changes_v204: Created js/compound.js as a safe staged module copy.
app-core.js still keeps original compound functions to preserve working合成模擬.
This prepares for later true extraction after dependencies are separated.
changes_v205: Created js/soul.js as a safe staged module copy.
app-core.js still keeps original soul functions to preserve working soul calculator.
This prepares for later full extraction after jiangshen split.
changes_v206: Created js/jiangshen.js as a safe staged module copy.
app-core.js still keeps original jiangshen/training functions to preserve all calculators.
This prepares for later true extraction and data JSON split.
changes_v207: Made soul.js active for CHANGEBODYITEM parser helpers.
Removed low-risk soul parser helper functions from app-core.js.
Kept jiangshen functions in app-core.js for now because they have many formula/data dependencies.
changes_v208: Embedded original showReverse UI inside js/reverse.js as showReverseOriginalV208.
reverse.js now fully owns reverse search and detail page while keeping old percent UI.
changes_v210: Moved low-risk item helpers/detail functions active to js/item.js.
Kept renderItemPage/searchItems/setItemSub in app-core/patch flow to avoid breaking reverse/compound menu.
